title: How Little John Joined Robin Hood
titleZh: 小约翰如何加入罗宾汉

q.en: On the narrow bridge, whose band does John Little fight before joining it?
q.zh: 在窄桥上，小约翰在与谁的手下交手后才加入其中？

options.en: The Sheriff of Nottingham according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 诺丁汉郡长（按书中另一种说法）

explain.en: John Little fought Robin Hood on the bridge and was later invited to join Robin's band.
explain.zh: 小约翰在桥上与罗宾汉交手，之后受邀加入罗宾汉的队伍。

q.en: What weapon did Robin Hood and John Little use to fight on the bridge?
q.zh: 罗宾汉和小约翰在桥上用的是什么武器搏斗？

options.en: Bows and arrows according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 弓箭（按书中另一种说法）

explain.en: Robin cut down two oak branches to serve as cudgels so the fight would be fair.
explain.zh: 罗宾砍下两根橡树枝作棍棒，以使打斗公平。

q.en: At the archery match, how far away was the white bark target?
q.zh: 在射箭比赛中，白色树皮靶子距离多远？

options.en: Five feet according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 五英尺（按书中另一种说法）

explain.en: Robin tied a three-inch piece of white bark to an oak tree a full eighty yards away.
explain.zh: 罗宾把一块三英寸宽的白树皮绑在足足八十码外的橡树上。

q.en: Why was the huge stranger given the name 'Little John'?
q.zh: 为什么这个高大的陌生人被起了'小约翰'这个名字？

options.en: Because he was the smallest in the band according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 因为他是队伍中最矮小的（按书中另一种说法）

options.en: As a joke, because he was actually very large
options.zh: 作为一个玩笑，因为他其实非常高大

explain.en: Will Scarlet joked that 'John Little' did not describe his puny stature, so they called him Little John.
explain.zh: 威尔·斯卡利特开玩笑说'小约翰'配不上他矮小的体格，于是叫他小约翰。

q.en: The story says Robin 'was hunted by both the ruling lords and the Sheriff of Nottingham's forces.' What does this show?
q.zh: 故事说罗宾'被统治贵族和诺丁汉郡长的军队双方追捕'。这说明了什么？

options.en: He is an outlaw wanted by the authorities
options.zh: 他是一名被当局通缉的逃犯

options.en: He is a farmer according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 他是个农民（按书中另一种说法）

explain.en: Robin Hood became an outlaw who stole from the rich and gave to the poor, so authorities hunted him.
explain.zh: 罗宾汉成了劫富济贫的逃犯，因此被当局追捕。

q.en: When the stranger declares his 'allegiance' to Robin, what does 'allegiance' mean?
q.zh: 当陌生人向罗宾宣告他的'allegiance'（忠诚）时，'allegiance'是什么意思？

options.en: Loyalty or dedication to a person or group
options.zh: 对一个人或团体的忠诚或奉献

options.en: A place to live according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 居住的地方（按书中另一种说法）

explain.en: The stranger declared his allegiance, meaning loyalty and dedication to Robin's band.
explain.zh: 陌生人宣告了他的忠诚，即对自己队伍的效忠与奉献。

q.en: After Robin is knocked into the water, what does he do?
q.zh: 罗宾被打落水中后，他做了什么？

options.en: Gives up fighting forever according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 永远放弃打斗（按书中另一种说法）

options.en: Laughs and invites the stranger to join his band
options.zh: 大笑，并邀请陌生人加入他的队伍

explain.en: Robin laughed, admitted he was beaten fairly, and asked the stranger to join his band.
explain.zh: 罗宾大笑着承认自己公平落败，并请陌生人加入队伍。

q.en: Among Robin's Merry Men, which one was a cobbler?
q.zh: 在罗宾的快乐伙伴中，哪一位是鞋匠？

explain.en: At Robin's side were David of Doncaster the cobbler, Will Scarlet, Much the miller's son, Arthur a Bland the tanner, and others.
explain.zh: 罗宾身边有鞋匠唐卡斯特的大卫、威尔·斯卡利特、磨坊主之子马奇、鞣皮匠亚瑟等人。

q.en: What is the author's main purpose in telling this folktale?
q.zh: 作者讲述这个民间故事的主要目的是什么？

options.en: To entertain and explain how Robin gained his loyal friend Little John
options.zh: 为了娱乐，并解释罗宾如何获得忠实的朋友小约翰

options.en: To describe a science experiment according to some versions of the story in an early draft of the book
options.zh: 为了描述科学实验（按书中另一种说法）（在书的早期草稿中）

explain.en: As a folktale, the story entertains while showing how Little John became Robin's right-hand man.
explain.zh: 作为民间故事，它既娱乐读者，又展现小约翰如何成为罗宾的得力助手。

q.en: After losing the fight, Robin refuses to punish John Little. What trait does this show?
q.zh: 输掉打斗后，罗宾拒绝惩罚小约翰。这表现出他什么品质？

options.en: Forgetfulness according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 健忘（按书中另一种说法）

explain.en: Robin said it was a fair fight and he wanted the brave stranger in his band, showing he held no grudge.
explain.zh: 罗宾说这是公平的打斗，并希望这位勇士加入，说明他不计前嫌。

prompt.en: Retell the bridge fight between Robin Hood and John Little in your own words in 4-5 sentences, including how it ended.
prompt.zh: 用自己的话复述罗宾汉与小约翰在桥上的打斗，写4到5句话，并说明结局。

en: Say what weapon they used and why Robin chose it.
Mention that neither could knock the other off for about two hours.
Explain that Robin lost but invited John to join.
zh: 说出他们用了什么武器，以及罗宾为何这样选。
提到约两小时内谁也未能把对方打落水。
说明罗宾落败却邀请约翰加入。
